installFfmpeg.title: Install ffmpeg
installFfmpeg.description: WhisperFlow Studio needs ffmpeg to decode audio. Pick a package manager below, or open the vendor site.
installFfmpeg.noManagers: No supported package manager found for this platform.
installFfmpeg.statusNeedsAdmin: Requires admin — run in your own terminal
installFfmpeg.verifyFailed: {{manager}} reported a successful install, but {{package}} is still not found on the system. The download or extraction probably failed silently — please try another package manager.
installFfmpeg.scoopUpdateWarning: ⚠ The first Scoop install runs a full bucket update first — this can take several minutes before ffmpeg itself starts downloading.

closeWhileRunning.title: WhisperFlow Studio
closeWhileRunning.detail: Force-closing will abort the current transcription job. Close anyway?
